title: Office Small Talk 办公室闲聊

lines.en: Hey Lily, how was your weekend?
Pretty good. I just stayed home and watched some movies.
lines.zh: 还不错。我就待在家里看了几部电影。

lines.en: Yes, a new comedy on Netflix. You should check it out.
lines.zh: 有的，Netflix上一部新喜剧。你应该看看。

lines.en: I will. By the way, are you going to the team lunch tomorrow?
lines.zh: 我会的。对了，你明天去团队午餐吗？

lines.en: Of course. I heard the new Italian place is really good.
lines.zh: 当然。听说那家新开的意大利餐厅很棒。

lines.en: I have heard that too. I am looking forward to it.
Me too. It is nice to take a break from work.
lines.zh: 我也是。能从工作中休息一下真好。
